item.name: Breeds

description.content: List and look up master breeds and their sub-breeds.

item.name: Dog API List All Breeds

request.name: Dog API List All Breeds

description.content: Returns the complete master breed list with each breed's sub-breeds (if any).

response.name: Successful response with master breed list.

item.name: Dog API Random Breed Entry

request.name: Dog API Random Breed Entry

description.content: Returns a single randomly selected entry from the master breed list (one breed mapped to its sub-breeds).

response.name: A single random breed and its sub-breeds.

item.name: Dog API Multiple Random Breed Entries

request.name: Dog API Multiple Random Breed Entries

description.content: Returns multiple randomly selected entries from the master breed list.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random breed entries to return.

response.name: A map of random breeds to their sub-breeds.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random breed entries to return.

item.name: Dog API List Top-Level Breeds

request.name: Dog API List Top-Level Breeds

description.content: Returns the list of all top-level (master) breed names without sub-breeds.

response.name: An array of top-level breed names.

item.name: Dog API Random Top-Level Breed

request.name: Dog API Random Top-Level Breed

description.content: Returns a single randomly selected top-level breed name.

response.name: A single random top-level breed name.

item.name: Dog API Multiple Random Top-Level Breeds

request.name: Dog API Multiple Random Top-Level Breeds

description.content: Returns multiple randomly selected top-level breed names.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random top-level breed names to return.

response.name: An array of random top-level breed names.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random top-level breed names to return.

item.name: Dog API List Sub-Breeds

request.name: Dog API List Sub-Breeds

description.content: Returns the list of sub-breeds for the given master breed.

variable.description: (Required) Master breed name (e.g., hound, retriever, spaniel).

response.name: An array of sub-breed names.

variable.description: (Required) Master breed name (e.g., hound, retriever, spaniel).

response.name: Breed not found.

variable.description: (Required) Master breed name (e.g., hound, retriever, spaniel).

item.name: Dog API Random Sub-Breed

request.name: Dog API Random Sub-Breed

description.content: Returns a single random sub-breed for the given master breed.

response.name: A single random sub-breed name.

item.name: Dog API Multiple Random Sub-Breeds

request.name: Dog API Multiple Random Sub-Breeds

description.content: Returns multiple random sub-breeds for the given master breed.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random sub-breeds to return.

response.name: An array of random sub-breed names.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random sub-breeds to return.

item.name: Images

description.content: Fetch random or breed-specific dog images (with optional alt text).

item.name: Dog API List Images by Breed

request.name: Dog API List Images by Breed

description.content: Returns all image URLs for a given master breed.

response.name: An array of image URLs for the breed.

item.name: Dog API Random Image by Breed

request.name: Dog API Random Image by Breed

description.content: Returns a single random image URL for the given master breed.

response.name: A single random image URL for the breed.

item.name: Dog API Multiple Random Images by Breed

request.name: Dog API Multiple Random Images by Breed

description.content: Returns multiple random image URLs for the given master breed.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random images to return.

response.name: An array of random image URLs for the breed.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random images to return.

item.name: Dog API List Images by Sub-Breed

request.name: Dog API List Images by Sub-Breed

description.content: Returns all image URLs for a given sub-breed.

response.name: An array of image URLs for the sub-breed.

item.name: Dog API Random Image by Sub-Breed

request.name: Dog API Random Image by Sub-Breed

description.content: Returns a single random image URL for the given sub-breed.

response.name: A single random image URL for the sub-breed.

item.name: Dog API Multiple Random Images by Sub-Breed

request.name: Dog API Multiple Random Images by Sub-Breed

description.content: Returns multiple random image URLs for the given sub-breed.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random images to return.

response.name: An array of random image URLs for the sub-breed.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random images to return.

item.name: Dog API Random Image From Any Breed

request.name: Dog API Random Image From Any Breed

description.content: Returns a random dog image URL from any breed.

response.name: A single random image URL.

item.name: Dog API Multiple Random Images From Any Breed

request.name: Dog API Multiple Random Images From Any Breed

description.content: Returns multiple random dog image URLs from any breed.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random images to return.

response.name: An array of random image URLs.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random images to return.

item.name: Dog API Multiple Random Images From Any Breed With Alt Text

request.name: Dog API Multiple Random Images From Any Breed With Alt Text

description.content: Returns multiple random images from any breed paired with descriptive alt text.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random images to return.

response.name: An array of image objects each containing a URL and alt text.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random images to return.

item.name: Dog API List Images by Breed With Alt Text

request.name: Dog API List Images by Breed With Alt Text

description.content: Returns all images for the given master breed paired with descriptive alt text.

response.name: An array of image objects each containing a URL and alt text.

item.name: Dog API Multiple Random Images by Breed With Alt Text

request.name: Dog API Multiple Random Images by Breed With Alt Text

description.content: Returns multiple random images for the given master breed paired with descriptive alt text.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random images to return.

response.name: An array of image objects each containing a URL and alt text.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random images to return.

item.name: Dog API List Images by Sub-Breed With Alt Text

request.name: Dog API List Images by Sub-Breed With Alt Text

description.content: Returns all images for the given sub-breed paired with descriptive alt text.

response.name: An array of image objects each containing a URL and alt text.

item.name: Dog API Multiple Random Images by Sub-Breed With Alt Text

request.name: Dog API Multiple Random Images by Sub-Breed With Alt Text

description.content: Returns multiple random images for the given sub-breed paired with descriptive alt text.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random images to return.

response.name: An array of image objects each containing a URL and alt text.

variable.description: (Required) Number of random images to return.

item.name: Info

description.content: Look up free-text breed information where available.

item.name: Dog API Get Breed Info

request.name: Dog API Get Breed Info

description.content: Returns free-text descriptive information about the given master breed when available.

response.name: Free-text breed information.
No info file exists for this breed.

item.name: Dog API Get Sub-Breed Info

request.name: Dog API Get Sub-Breed Info

description.content: Returns free-text descriptive information about the given sub-breed when available.

response.name: Free-text sub-breed information.
No info file exists for this sub-breed.

description.content:
The Dog API (dog.ceo) is the internet's largest collection of open-source dog pictures, exposing over 20,000 dog images accessible by more than 120 breeds. The API is free, requires no authentication, and returns JSON. An optional `alt` variant returns image URLs paired with descriptive alt text for accessibility. The canonical implementation is the open-source PHP Symfony project at github.com/ElliottLandsborough/dog-ceo-api, licensed MIT.

Contact Support:
 Name: Dog API
